required_buffers.name: reprojected_history
required_buffers.semantic: history color reprojected into the current frame

required_buffers.name: motion_vectors
required_buffers.semantic: per-pixel motion vectors in pixel units to the previous frame

required_buffers.name: reprojected_depth
required_buffers.semantic: previous-frame depth reprojected into the current frame

required_buffers.name: current_normals
required_buffers.semantic: current frame normals in a consistent view-space basis

required_buffers.name: reprojected_normals
required_buffers.semantic: previous-frame normals reprojected into the current frame

optional_buffers.name: optional_mask
optional_buffers.semantic: debug mask or ROI-like disclosure mask

optional_buffers.name: optional_reference
optional_buffers.semantic: optional reference or ground-truth frame for external evaluator comparisons

optional_buffers.name: optional_ground_truth
optional_buffers.semantic: optional explicit ground-truth frame if the exporter uses a separate field name

optional_buffers.name: optional_variance
optional_buffers.semantic: optional variance estimate to support imported adaptive-sampling proxy analysis

raw_buffer_requirements.width: required inline for raw buffers unless the loader receives matching metadata dimensions
raw_buffer_requirements.height: required inline for raw buffers unless the loader receives matching metadata dimensions
raw_buffer_requirements.channels: required inline for raw buffers; color/normals >= 3, motion >= 2, scalar/mask = 1
